title: Home glucose log review

investigations.text: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.
investigations.rationale: The exact DHA annual-review section supports change, hypoglycaemia and functional context, measured weight, clinician-reviewed metabolic laboratory results and arranged follow-up for adults with type 2 diabetes.
investigations.evidence_extract: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Type 2 Diabetes – 30

treatment_and_management.text: Supports documenting monitoring method, circumstances, treatment context, suspected inaccuracy, interfering substances and reviewed blood-glucose records.
treatment_and_management.rationale: The exact BGM section supports documenting monitoring context, reviewed home records, relevant symptoms or negatives, patient concerns and a clinician-entered plan without interpreting readings or changing treatment.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports documenting monitoring method, circumstances, treatment context, suspected inaccuracy, interfering substances and reviewed blood-glucose records.

source.title: 7. Diabetes Technology: Standards of Care in Diabetes—2026

source_limitations: Diabetes type, device, date range, individual values, fasting or post-meal context, symptoms, hypoglycaemia events, medicines, adherence, goals, interpretation and treatment remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
